series_metadata.series_title: Permanent Record Cards -- Officer and Warrant Officer Personnel
series_metadata.series_description: This card is prepared when an officer or warrant officer is appointed in the Ohio National Guard. It consists of a brief resume of the individual's military service. This card provides a cross reference to the individual's file and is used to reply to inquiries when service information is requested.
